html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly

Claw AnchorClaw Anchor Kit

The Claw Anchor is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together.

The Claw Anchor Kit can be deployed on a Boat. The Claw Anchor can then be lowered to prevent the Boat from drifting, or be raised to allow it to move again. The time it takes for the Anchor to rise depends on the depth of the Ocean: 2 seconds on Coastal Ocean and Brine Shoals, 6 seconds on Swell Ocean, 8 seconds in Rough Ocean and 10 seconds in Hazardous Ocean. The time it takes for it to lower is a third of the raising time.

If an Anchor is hammered, it will leave a boat leak in its place.

A thing to keep in mind is that the anchor will not prevent the boat from drifting away if the sails are still open. They need to be closed, otherwise the boat will still drift away slowly.

Gallery

  • Burnt
  • Used on ground
  • Deep level0
  • Deep level1
  • Deep level2
  • Deep level3

Claw AnchorClaw Anchor Kit
“I wouldn't want my boat to fly away.”
–Wilson, when examining a Claw Anchor
“It better be the only thing going into the water today.”
–Willow, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Ha! Shiny anchor is not heavy for Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Its golden luster will be lost beneath the sea.”
–Wendy, when examining a Claw Anchor
“BETTER YOU IN THE WATER THAN ME”
–WX-78, when examining a Claw Anchor
“One of the more curious uses for gold I've seen yet.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Pretty fancy for an anchor, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Such exquisite craftsmanship. Into the water it goes.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Claw Anchor
“May it grip the sea floor with all its strength.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Grab onto the sea floor real tight, okay?”
–Webber, when examining a Claw Anchor
“It seems a shame to drop such a dazzling thing into the sea.”
–Warly, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Hold onto sea bottom”
–Wormwood, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Awful fancy for somethin' that'll spend most of its time underwater.”
–Winona, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Dipped in gold, now dropped in the drink.”
–Wortox, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Carful not to hurt any fishies on way down, florp!”
–Wurt, when examining a Claw Anchor
“That's gotta be the fanciest anchor I've ever seen.”
–Walter, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Quite the afternoonified anchor.”
–Wanda, when examining a Claw Anchor
“Now I can build an anchor.”
–Wilson, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“Ooo, let's build an anchor.”
–Willow, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“Is for making big boat weight.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“It's for a burdensome boat anchor.”
–Wendy, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“FOR BUILDING A RIDICULOUS ANCHOR”
–WX-78, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“It will allow us to create an anchor for our ships.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“A little elbow grease and we'll have an anchor.”
–Woodie, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“Can't someone else assemble it?”
–Maxwell, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“I will craft the finest ship in the land!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“That's for making an anchor.”
–Webber, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“Looks like a recipe for an anchor.”
–Warly, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“Heavy...”
–Wormwood, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“Someone's gotta assemble this anchor, might as well be me.”
–Winona, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“Such funny ship things I could build.”
–Wortox, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“Can make boat-stopper!”
–Wurt, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“I've got all the supplies ready to build an anchor.”
–Walter, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
“I guess it might be useful... but I'd rather not to stay in one place for too long.”
–Wanda, when examining a Claw Anchor Kit
The Claw Anchor is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together.
The Claw Anchor Kit can be deployed on a Boat. The Claw Anchor can then be lowered to prevent the Boat from drifting, or be raised to allow it to move again. The time it takes for the Anchor to rise depends on the depth of the Ocean: 2 seconds on Coastal Ocean and Brine Shoals, 6 seconds on Swell Ocean, 8 seconds in Rough Ocean and 10 seconds in Hazardous Ocean. The time it takes for it to lower is a third of the raising time.
If an Anchor is hammered, it will leave a boat leak in its place.
A thing to keep in mind is that the anchor will not prevent the boat from drifting away if the sails are still open. They need to be closed, otherwise the boat will still drift away slowly.

The '''Claw Anchor''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''.

The Claw Anchor Kit can be deployed on a [[Boat Kit|Boat]]. The Claw Anchor can then be lowered to prevent the Boat from drifting, or be raised to allow it to move again. The time it takes for the Anchor to rise depends on the depth of the Ocean: 2 seconds on [[Ocean#Coastal Ocean|Coastal Ocean]] and [[Ocean#Brine Shoals|Brine Shoals]], 6 seconds on [[Ocean#Swell Ocean|Swell Ocean]], 8 seconds in [[Ocean#Rough Ocean|Rough Ocean]] and 10 seconds in [[Ocean#Hazardous Ocean|Hazardous Ocean]]. The time it takes for it to lower is a third of the raising time.

If an Anchor is hammered, it will leave a boat leak in its place.

A thing to keep in mind is that the anchor will not prevent the boat from drifting away if the sails are still open. They need to be closed, otherwise the boat will still drift away slowly.
